decisions.decision: Clean slate homepage — wiped to single skeleton section
decisions.rationale: Avoid muddiness, start fresh, old data preserved in git history. NOTE: only index.json was reset; product/collection templates remain fully built.

decisions.decision: Adopt DESIGN.md (amethyst #8b5cf6 + warm gold #d97706) as the canonical design system
decisions.rationale: Confirmed by Aaron 2026-07-05. Matches the original brief (violet primary + gold secondary). Existing product/collection pages are painted in an old amber palette and will be migrated onto the new tokens.

decisions.decision: Design DNA already reverse-engineered into DESIGN.md — no live Chrome reverse-engineering session needed
decisions.rationale: monopo saigon extraction completed and adapted to amethyst/gold. Remaining work is IMPLEMENTATION, not extraction. Visual checks use claude-in-chrome / agent-browser skill.

decisions.decision: RESOLVED — keep existing Inter + Cormorant fonts, drop Roobert/Raleway
decisions.rationale: Confirmed by Aaron 2026-07-05. Roobert only appeared because DESIGN.md was reverse-engineered from monopo saigon (which uses Roobert) — it is a commercial font not in Shopify's library and is all-sans. The theme already runs Inter (body: inter_n4/inter_n6) + Cormorant (headings: cormorant_n3, accent: cormorant_i4), which matches the brief's 'serif mystical headings + clean sans body' better than Roobert and needs zero licensing. Phase 2 swaps COLOURS to amethyst/gold but leaves fonts as-is. (DESIGN.md's typography section is the weakest part — it even mislabels Raleway as serif; do not treat it as authoritative on fonts.) Open sub-question deferred to visual review: is Cormorant distinctive enough vs 'template-looking'?

reality_check_2026_07_05.product: fully built (product.json, 437 lines) — old amber palette
reality_check_2026_07_05.design_system: documented in DESIGN.md, 0% implemented in code (no amethyst/roobert tokens exist yet)
reality_check_2026_07_05.amber_hardcoding: ~33 refs across 12 spellbound-*.liquid sections + spellbound-custom.css, to be repointed to new tokens

next_action: 1) Browser baseline of localhost:9292 (home/product/collection) via claude-in-chrome to capture the current amber-era look. 2) Plan + implement Phase 2 Design System: (a) swap the ACCENT colours in config/settings_data.json scheme-1/scheme-2 from amber (#fde68a/#f59e0b) to amethyst #8b5cf6 + warm gold #d97706 — keep near-black bg; (b) add a --spellbound-* amethyst/gold token layer at the top of assets/spellbound-custom.css; (c) repoint the ~33 hardcoded amber refs across the 12 spellbound-*.liquid sections + spellbound-custom.css to those tokens; (d) add the light/dark theme toggle (DSGN-02) with localStorage persistence. FONTS STAY as Inter + Cormorant — do NOT introduce Roobert/Raleway. Source of truth for colours/spacing/components: phases/02-design-system/DESIGN.md (ignore its typography section and ignore refs/monopo-saigon/variables.css which still has monopo's original green palette).
context_notes: Phase 1 (Foundation Skeleton) COMPLETE. Phase 2 (Design System) is the frontier: DNA captured in DESIGN.md, canonical palette = amethyst+gold (confirmed 2026-07-05), implementation not started. Docs + project memory reconciled to actual code state 2026-07-05. The store is totally-spellbound-2. Owner Alison (crystal shop, Sutton-in-Ashfield); Andrew is tech lead.
